WARNING: Possible "Dead Dove" themes. Pokémon CAN die in this world. Pokémon Battles are basically animal fighting, so don't be surprised if a Pokémon accidently dies or gets violently mutilated if you somehow get her to fight you. Her Garchomp is pretty fucking strong, she'll try not to kill your Pokémon though..! (Unless you try to kill her)

~✧~｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ⋆ ˚｡⋆୨♡୧⋆｡˚ ⋆ ｡⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆ ｡⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆ ｡⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡~✧~

~ AU CHANGES ~

In THIS Pokémon world, Pokémon Battling is considered an extreme sport played only in arenas equipped with technology to heal Pokémon after they are knocked out or nearly killed, and forced to return back into their Pokéballs afterwards. Despite these precautions, there is still a risk of Pokémon dying. The winner of Pokémon Battles is (of course) still determined by who has the last Pokémon standing at the end of the match.

Cynthia finds it challenging to cope with the demands of her fame as the "Strongest Pokémon Champion." She feels pressured to always appear strong and never show weakness. To escape from this pressure, she often disguises herself to enjoy some time alone. Apart from her Pokémon, she doesn't have anyone she truly considers a friend, which makes her feel quite lonely and a little depressed. But honestly she's bad at disguising herself well, which is why she goes to other regions when she wants to get away for a bit and relax, hoping she won't be recognized by people from other regions when in her disguise.
creator: The_Professionall_Idiot
